mte_summary: New DME - Business Support User Bizagi Role Required (MDR-1066) - CCBA3 Role Creation and Segregation of Duty Validation

test_cases.summary: Regression: Standard Buyer Work Queue (BPMS002) - CCBA3 Role

description.scenario: Verify that a user assigned to the new CCBA3 role can successfully run the Buyer Work Queue (BPMS002) and process a standard purchase requisition without viewing User Administration screens.
description.expected_result: User can view and process BPMS002 cases, submit buyer review, and transfer cases. User cannot access User Administration screens.

steps.action: Go to Bizagi and open the Buyer Work Queue session (BPMS002).
Verify the user is logged in with the new CCBA3 role and AD Group ROLE-G-BAE-CCBA3-XXX.
steps.expected_result: User identity confirmed as CCBA3 role.

steps.action: Select a purchase requisition from the queue and click Next.
steps.expected_result: Case loads with buyer review fields visible.

steps.action: Set RFx required as No and Buyer review completed as Yes.
Click Next to submit the buyer review.
Attempt to navigate to the User Administration screen (User Permissions Report).
steps.expected_result: Access denied or screen not visible (Segregation of Duty enforced).

steps.action: Refresh the Bizagi case and verify the case status is Pending DOA.
Complete DOA approval in the case.
Verify the case is transferred to the next stage (BWQ).
Verify the case is completed with no outstanding actions.

test_cases.summary: Regression: Purchase Order Search and Supplier Response (BPMS016) - CCBA3 Role

description.scenario: Verify that a user assigned to the new CCBA3 role can search for Purchase Orders (BPMS058.1/058.2) and complete Supplier Response (BPMS016) for approved POs.
description.expected_result: User can search POs, open POs, and complete Supplier Response ACC. User cannot edit User Administration screens.

steps.action: Go to Bizagi and open the Purchase Order search session (BPMS058.1).
Search for an approved Purchase Order using the requisition line number.
Select a PO and open it in the Bizagi case.
Navigate to the Supplier Response tab (BPMS016).
Complete the Supplier Response with status ACC.
Submit the Supplier Response.
Attempt to access the User Permissions Report (Admin Process management).
steps.expected_result: Access denied or report not visible.

steps.action: Verify the user can still run the Inhouse metals PO create (BPMS042.2) if applicable.
steps.expected_result: BPMS042.2 session opens and functions correctly.

steps.action: Verify the user can re-assign or cancel cases in the Admin Review queue.
Verify the user can re-send Exostar BOD.
